message:
Add trigger-build workflow for CI/CD via sen-deploy

On push to main, dispatches a build event to sen-deploy which builds
the session-explorer Docker image and deploys to ECS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+name: Trigger Build
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  trigger:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Generate app token
+        id: app-token
+        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
+        with:
+          app-id: ${{ vars.APP_ID }}
+          private-key: ${{ secrets.APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
+          owner: prime-radiant-inc
+          repositories: sen-deploy
+
+      - name: Calculate short SHA
+        id: sha
+        run: echo "short=$(echo ${{ github.sha }} | cut -c1-7)" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+
+      - name: Trigger sen-deploy build
+        uses: peter-evans/repository-dispatch@v3
+        with:
+          token: ${{ steps.app-token.outputs.token }}
+          repository: prime-radiant-inc/sen-deploy
+          event-type: build
+          client-payload: '{"repo": "claude-session-viewer", "sha": "${{ github.sha }}", "sha_short": "${{ steps.sha.outputs.short }}"}'
